creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

miwi        2012-06-10 16:32:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-sanetime    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A sane date/time Python interface: better epoch time, timezones, and deltas
  with Django support as well
  
  WWW:    https://github.com/HubSpot/sanetime
  
  PR:             ports/168663
  Submitted by:   koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
